# Side Hustle Summit Affiliate Program (2026)

> Partner hub for the Side Hustle Summit 2026 affiliate program: the official partner program for the virtual event hosted by Russell Brunson (co-founder of ClickFunnels) and Iman Gadzhi (founder of IAG Media, creator of Monetise), running September 6-15, 2026.

## Key facts

- The Side Hustle Summit Affiliate Program pays affiliates up to $1,032 per customer across the full funnel: the $1,995 Monetise core offer by Iman Gadzhi, a $995 companion offer, and additional upsells.
- A $122,500 affiliate prize pool is split across two contests that can be entered and won simultaneously: an Opt-In Race ($15,000 for 1st place, $5,000 for 2nd) and a Sales Leaderboard paying the top five sellers $50,000, $25,000, $15,000, $10,000 and $7,500.
- Affiliates promote free registration to the summit; the event converts registrants into buyers. Live training runs September 7-11, 2026, and the sales window closes September 15, 2026.
- Organic promotion opens August 10, 2026. Paid traffic is authorized from August 17, 2026.
- Joining is free, invitation-only, and handled through the FirstPromoter platform.
- Monetise is Iman Gadzhi's flagship program teaching personal-brand monetization (content, audience growth, affiliate marketing, sponsorships, consulting) and is the core offer sold at the summit.
- The Russell Brunson affiliate program and the Iman Gadzhi affiliate program for 2026 are unified under this single Side Hustle Summit partner program.

## Register as an affiliate

- Partner registration (free, via invitation link): https://sidehustlesummitpartner.firstpromoter.com?sref=fo7a0wb

## Disclosure

This is an independent partner page operated by a Side Hustle Summit affiliate, not the official event website. The operator earns commissions and referral rewards from registrations and purchases made through the links above. Income figures are program maximums; individual results are not guaranteed.
